settings.heading: Making Glass Railing Accessible to All
settings.subtext: The preferred supplier for frameless glass railing in North America. 101+ dealer locations nationwide.

settings.heading: Beautifully Simple.
settings.text: Since 2010, RF Transparent has been at the forefront of the industry, delivering exceptional frameless glass railing solutions. We focus exclusively on this craft, ensuring the highest quality and innovation in every project.

settings.heading: Expert Craftsmanship.
settings.text: Our products are expertly manufactured with a focus on precision and strength. Each piece is meticulously crafted and carefully packaged at one of our Canadian distribution centers, ensuring the highest quality and reliability.

settings.feature: Guided directly to your nearest dealer

settings.heading: Get Your Personalized Quote
settings.text: Tell us about your project and we'll connect you with your nearest authorized dealer for a smooth, customized experience from start to finish.

settings.name: Matthew Otten
settings.text: Excellent service, great value and so far a terrific product. Installation was easy with proper preparation, and the panels are HEAVY. Looking forward to many years of unobstructed views!

settings.name: Dave Wilson
settings.text: I initially found out about this company at Home Hardware where they had a very small display. I was happy to browse the website and see more pictures and options to choose from. Highly recommend!! Great product, price and readily available.

settings.name: Bill Ernewein
settings.text: At first, I really thought that glass was not going to be an option for my deck as I wanted to do a DIY project. But wow! I was shocked by the pricing.

settings.heading: What Our Clients Have to Say

settings.question: How long does it take to get my railing?
settings.answer: Orders within Canada are typically delivered within 2–5 business days. For the United States, delivery may take 1–4 weeks depending on shipping destination and customs clearance.

settings.question: What is the difference between RF product and other mainstream brands?
settings.answer: Our system is one of the easiest to install on the market. We offer three distinct heights compared to the single height typically available from other brands. Each height comes in about 40 different widths. Our glass is 12mm thick, and our hardware is guaranteed against rust for 10 years.

settings.question: What if my local hardware store is not a dealer?
settings.answer: No worries! We can deliver to any hardware store, even if they’re not currently a dealer. We’ll reach out to your preferred store to accommodate your needs. If they can’t, we’ll arrange for direct delivery to you.

settings.question: How do I install RF Transparent Glass Railing?
settings.answer: Our adjustable spigots allow for easy alignment and customization. The variable gap options provide flexibility, so even with minor measurement errors, you’ll achieve a perfect fit. Find detailed instructions on our installation page.

settings.question: What are the warranties on the product?
settings.answer: We offer a lifetime warranty on our glass, ensuring it is free from manufacturing defects. Our hardware is guaranteed against rust. If you receive any damaged items, we replace them—no questions asked.

settings.question: How long does glass railing last?
settings.answer: Glass railing is one of the strongest options available. Our glass is over twice as thick as a standard car window, reinforced by the heaviest spigots in the industry. With proper care, glass railings provide years of safety and aesthetic appeal.

settings.question: There are no dealers in my area, how do I buy the product?
settings.answer: We will locate a hardware store in your area. If you’re in a remote location, we can deliver straight to your home. At RF, we believe that no one should be overlooked.

settings.heading: Stay in the Loop
settings.text: Get the latest product updates, installation tips, and exclusive offers delivered to your inbox.
